name: Diet Tortillas Rancheros
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine diced tomatoes, red pepper, scallions, coriander and 2 teaspoons lime juice (juice and zest).
Add cumin, chili powder, salt and red pepper flakes.
2. Stir in black beans until combined.
3. Warm the flour tortillas one at a time in a hot skillet.
4. Place a tortilla on a plate and top with shredded lettuce.
Spoon the tomato mixture onto the center of the tortilla and sprinkle with peanuts.
Notes: 315 calories
